boat.name: Ida of Falmouth
boat.full_description: The mainsail has slab reefing with a winch on the boom by the goosneck. Her jib has Schaffer roller furling, staysail has Furlex drum roller reefing. A new mainmast was made by Collers, 2016 and new gallows, 2017.
boat.short_description: 'Ida of Falmouth' is a Heard 35 Falmouth Quay punt, built to Jeff Baker's plans in 2001.

for_sales.sales_text:
Built in 2001 at Mylor by Martin Heard, "Ida" was the last of the Heard 35s. She sleeps six and has a fully equipped galley with hot and cold pumped water plus an Erbespacher central heating system. The saloon seats six around a lovely table. The cockpit also seats six with an additional detachable table for al-fresco dining.

She has spacious heads including shower and basin.

Lying ashore at Totnes.
